data.title: Mobix Labs (MOBX): F-22 Program Component Demand Jumps 5X as Production Advances
data.description: Mobix Labs, Inc. announced significant developments related to the F-22 Raptor program, disclosing involvement with a new client and heightened demand from an established partner. This surge has led to a substantial rise, approximately five-fold, in component orders. The company is actively engaged in production to meet the requirements for upcoming deliveries scheduled for 2026. The statement also includes forward-looking insights on production, shipments, and program engagements.

data.title: CardVault by Tom Brady to Open at Ballpark Village in St. Louis
data.description: A newly opened store called CardVault by Tom Brady has brought a premium collectibles experience to the Busch Stadium entrance, the home of the St. Louis Cardinals. The store opened on April 2, 2026, at Ballpark Village in St. Louis, Missouri. This new location marks the expansion of the Tom Brady-owned collectibles store, offering a wide range of premium items for sports enthusiasts and collectors. The store's strategic placement at the entrance of Busch Stadium aims to attract visitors and fans attending games and events. This launch signifies an exciting development for the store as it aims to cater to the bustling sports scene in St. Louis.

data.title: ChillCo Logistics Partners with Mattingly Cold Storage to Launch Midwest Platform
data.description: In Zanesville, Ohio on April 2, 2026, ChillCo Logistics ("ChillCo"), a recently established cold chain platform supported by long-term infrastructure investor Igneo Infrastructure Partners, revealed a new partnership with Mattingly Cold Storage, a top family-owned public company.

data.title: The Lupus Research Alliance and Rheumatology Research Foundation Commit $1.9M to Empower Early-Career Scientists
data.description: In an effort to advance lupus research and bolster the research workforce, prominent organizations in the field of rheumatology have joined forces. This collaboration, between the Lupus Research Alliance (LRA) and the Rheumatology Research Foundation, involves a significant financial commitment of $1.9 million. The aim of this partnership is to drive groundbreaking discoveries and pave the way for substantial advancements in the treatment of lupus. This strategic alliance underscores the importance of collective support and investment in research initiatives that have the potential to transform the landscape of lupus research.

data.title: Telegram's wallet introduces perpetual futures trading through Lighter DEX for leveraged trading on crypto, stocks, and commodities.
data.description: Telegram's Wallet has introduced perpetual futures trading through Lighter DEX, which allows users to engage in leveraged trading of cryptocurrencies, stocks, and commodities within the messaging app. This feature enables traders to take advantage of market movements and potentially increase their profits.

data.title: Bitcoin miners facing selling pressure as Riot wallet outflow of 500 BTC ($34M) contributes to market volatility.
data.description: The latest data from Arkham revealed a transfer of 500 Bitcoin (BTC) to Riot Platforms, estimated at around $34 million. This development comes at a time when Bitcoin miners and treasury firms are dealing with the challenges of meeting listing requirements and handling the unpredictability of the market.

data.title: Uniswap (UNI) introduces v2, v3, and v4 on Consensys Linea L2, offering enhanced DEX access with yield and ETH burn features.
data.description: The latest versions of Uniswap (UNI) - v2, v3, and v4 - are now operational on Linea zkEVM, a Layer 2 platform supported by ConsenSys. This development enhances decentralized exchange access, offering built-in yield features and mechanisms for burning Ethereum (ETH).

data.title: Trailblazing Federal Public Defender and Nationally Recognized Trial Attorney Cuauhtémoc Ortega Joins Stris & Maher LLP
data.description: Bringing extensive trial experience at the highest levels, Cuauhtémoc Ortega joins one of California's top litigation boutiques. On April 2, 2026, Stris & Maher LLP revealed Ortega's appointment, who previously served as the Federal Public Defender for the Central District of California. This move is poised to significantly impact the firm's capabilities, leveraging Ortega's expertise in trial proceedings. Established as one of the premier litigation firms in California, Stris & Maher LLP continues to strengthen its team with notable additions, further solidifying its position in the legal sector.

data.title: Healthee Joins the Workday Wellness Program to simplify benefits navigation
data.description: In an announcement made on April 2, 2026, Healthee, a cutting-edge AI platform focused on benefits navigation and cost containment, revealed its new partnership as a Workday Wellness Partner. The collaboration aims to assist employers in making more informed healthcare choices and enhancing overall wellness.

data.title: Cyera Achieves FedRAMP High “In Process” Designation to Securely Accelerate AI Adoption
data.description: In New York, Cyera, an AI Security Platform designed for modern agents, has attained the FedRAMP High "In Process" designation, marking a significant milestone towards complete authorization under the government's stringent FISMA high-impact data standards. With existing partnerships with major regulated enterprises, Cyera now introduces Cyera for Government to the public sector. This move aims to enhance security measures for sensitive data, highlighting the company's commitment to meeting high standards of protection.

data.title: The Movement Club Expands Into Home Fitness Equipment with Launch of The Everything Band
data.description: Inaugurated by Lindsay Arnold, The Movement Club debuts with a multifunctional resistance training tool capable of facilitating over 100 exercises. The launch took place in New York on April 2, 2026. The brand, founded by the ex-Dancing with the Stars professional, Lindsay Arnold, introduces its premier product showcasing versatility in fitness with a wide range of movement options.

data.title: 2026 BTM Young Professionals Career Summit - Greater NY to Address AI Disruption and Career Uncertainty for Young Talent
data.description: Experts in artificial intelligence, global human resources, technology, and immigration law will be providing valuable insights at an upcoming event in New York on April 2, 2026. The evolving landscape of work due to artificial intelligence will be a key focus of the discussions. Stay tuned for additional speakers to be announced.

data.title: What's Going On With Acuity Stock Thursday?
data.description: Acuity Inc. (AYI) disclosed its fiscal Q2 2026 results, revealing a revenue miss but an earnings beat. The company reported a 4.9% increase in quarterly net sales, reaching $1.06 billion, falling short of the anticipated $1.09 billion. Adjusted earnings were $4.14 per share, exceeding the projected $4.06. Acuity operates via Acuity Brands Lighting & Controls (ABL) and Acuity Intelligent Spaces (AIS). AIS showed notable growth with a 44.7% revenue surge to $248.1 million, whereas ABL saw a revenue decline to $817.4 million. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: YMCA FINAO Wellness Café Ignite 2026 Conference Press Release
data.description: SPV Inc. recently revealed its collaboration with the YMCA to establish The YMCA Wellness Café™, a health chain that complies with HIPAA guidelines.

data.title: Cardano ADA now fully integrated on Dune platform for data analysis, including ADA staking, smart contracts, and network activity across 50+ other chains.
data.description: Dune Analytics has recently incorporated data from the Cardano blockchain into its platform. This development allows researchers and traders to analyze information related to ADA staking, smart contracts, and network activity. Users now have access to data from over 50 different blockchain networks on the platform.
